notes:
🎉 Media Hub Deluxe Integration Complete!

✨ **Major Features Added:**
- **Enhanced Navigation** - Modern navbar with all pages accessible

- **Enhanced Components** - Netflix cards, rating badges, episode grids
- **Advanced Features** - Custom watchlists, priority management, progress tracking

- **Black Screen Issue** - Fixed completely when clicking movies/series

- **Navigation Problems** - All routes working properly
- **Missing Functionality** - All features from media-hub-deluxe integrated

🎯 **Improvements:**
- Enhanced error handling with proper loading states
- Better user experience with fallbacks for missing API keys
- Improved navigation with all pages accessible
- Enhanced watchlist with custom lists and priorities
- Better component organization and imports
